{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Rulers
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Rulers]] use their [[madra]] as a catalyst to control [[vital aura]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c7">''Unsouled'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
